title: Treasury yields follow oil prices higher as traders await latest jobs data
summary_full: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — was up more than 1 basis point to 4.675%
summary_public: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — was up more than 1 basis point to 4.675%
